final:
// // This SRAM cell has a single data input (D), a read disable (RD), a write disable (WD), and an 8-bit data output (Q). When WD is high, the value present at D should be stored into the SRAM cell. When RD is high, the value stored in the SRAM cell should be outputted on Q. Both WD and RD should not be active at the same time.
module sram_cell (
    input wire [7:0] D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    output reg [7:0] Q
);
    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(*) begin
        if (WE) begin
            memory <= D; // Write data to SRAM
        end
        if (RE) begin
            Q <= memory; // Read data from SRAM
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This SRAM cell has a single data input (D), a read disable (RD), a write disable (WD), and an 8-bit data output (Q). When WD is high, the value present at D should be stored into the SRAM cell. When RD is high, the value stored in the SRAM cell should be outputted on Q. Both WD and RD should not be active at the same time.
